positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of a mystical glowing forest portal and surrounding natural elements. The main subject is a vibrant, ethereal portal framed by lush, bioluminescent foliage, glowing mushroom clusters, and crystalline flora. Use a deep sapphire blue and emerald green color palette with highlights of glowing gold and cyan. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and intricate botanical etching, with clean, strong lines and detailed cross-hatching suggestive of a woodcut print. Focus on symmetry, high contrast between the glowing elements and the deep shadows, and a sense of magical depth. Minimal text/typography, suitable for scaling onto a shirt or tote bag.
negative: blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, messy, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, poorly rendered, cartoon, sketch
